source_policy: External Agent SOP/BMAD/Claude Code/Cursor/LangGraph methods are used as structure references only; no external runtime dependency is required.

sops.title: Task Intake Double Check
sops.summary: Parse user input into sourced CanonicalTaskBrief fields and require user confirmation before graph dispatch.

sops.title: Artifact Review Gate
sops.summary: Review one artifact at a time and route pass, needs_fix, or needs_human through conditional edges.
